commands.purpose: Run doctor checks, build shared contracts, validate preset registry, start shared and Web type watchers, and start the real Next Web app with Fast Refresh, fixtures, and bounded local draft writes.
Start the workbench and open the local UI Lab URL.
Verify Node, Git, dependencies, loopback host, port, assignments file, and required application paths.

Create one complete folder-first variant scaffold with manifest, React entry, CSS module, task file, shared local instructions, Claude guidance, AGENTS.md, and nested Cursor rules, then regenerate the static registry.
Validate one variant or every checked-in variant for manifest correctness, folder confinement, declared dependencies, forbidden server/network/storage access, and declared Worker/WASM features.
Regenerate the alphabetic static registry with literal manifest imports and literal lazy component imports.
commands.normal_user: Variant creation, rename, removal, or manifest change

commands.purpose: Watch variant manifests and entries and regenerate the static registry after changes.
List variant slug, lifecycle status, display name, and production eligibility.
Print a concise folder-local task prompt that preserves the write and capability boundaries.
Validate all variants, prove generated-registry parity, and assert the neutral contract, public variant contract, and host are present.

Scaffold when absent, generate tool-specific local instructions, validate, regenerate, start UI Lab and registry watching, open the exact scenario route, and launch the selected agent with the variant folder as working directory.
List all immutable UI preset versions and statuses.
commands.normal_user: Reviewer, product owner, or coding agent

commands.purpose: Validate schema, contiguous version chains, parent references, approved-source provenance, selector collisions, assignments, and generated runtime registry parity.
Generate the runtime-safe approved preset assignment registry from canonical presets and assignments.
Create a new immutable approved preset version from a validated draft, record human review and exact clean Git provenance, update selectors, and regenerate runtime registry data.
commands.normal_user: Human reviewer after code commit and validation
preconditions: at least one profile, business-kind, or employee-type selector

commands.purpose: Assign an already-approved reproducible preset to new selectors and regenerate runtime registry data.
Run the deterministic production-component workbench and preview browser matrix and write exact-head evidence and screenshots.
Run the same browser matrix visibly and keep the browser/server open for interactive diagnosis.
Validate UI source conventions and UI Lab registry consistency.
Verify singleton production projection architecture, workbench-to-isolated-preview routing, production component reuse, bounded draft writes, immutable versions, and reproducible promotion.
commands.normal_user: Every architecture-affecting UI change and CI

commands.purpose: Run UI port, registry, workbench, fixture guard, renderer, stream, and protocol source contracts.
Run complete repository governance, typecheck, lint, unit, and workspace build gates before merge.

guards: atomic exclusive create under ui-lab/presets only
forbidden: overwrite of an existing preset version
relative import escaping the variant folder
direct fetch, XMLHttpRequest, WebSocket, or EventSource
